title: iridorkis cylindrica
intro: Iridorkis cylindrica, also known as the Yellow Flag or Yellow Flag Lily, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its roots and rhizomes exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Iridorkis cylindrica have been found to provide various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and anti-cancer properties. Iridorkis cylindrica is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and also used in traditional African medicine as a powder or dried root, to treat a range of health conditions.
